user.title: Set up Plant Monitor
user.description:
Create the central Plant Monitor integration.
Plants can be added afterwards from the integration page.

user.title: Add plant
user.description: Select a soil moisture sensor and define when the plant needs watering.

data_description.name: Name used for the plant device and its entities.
data_description.moisture_sensor: Sensor providing a numeric soil moisture value from 0 to 100.
data_description.dry_below: The plant needs watering when moisture falls below this value.
data_description.clear_at: The watering alert clears when moisture reaches or exceeds this value.

reconfigure.title: Edit plant
reconfigure.description: Update the soil moisture sensor or watering thresholds.

data_description.name: Name used for the plant device and its entities.
data_description.moisture_sensor: Sensor providing a numeric soil moisture value from 0 to 100.
data_description.dry_below: The plant needs watering when moisture falls below this value.
data_description.clear_at: The watering alert clears when moisture reaches or exceeds this value.

error.invalid_thresholds: Clear alert at must be greater than dry below.
error.sensor_already_used: This soil moisture sensor is already assigned to another plant.
